seo.title: Lavish Travels & Tours — Luxury Travel Sri Lanka
seo.description: Bespoke journeys across tea country, heritage forts, and golden coasts in Sri Lanka.

hero.title: Elegance Across Sri Lanka
hero.subtitle: Bespoke journeys across tea country, heritage forts, and golden coasts — crafted by experts.
hero.imageAlt: Lavish Sri Lanka luxury travel hero — tea country at sunrise

destinations.title: Discover Sri Lanka
destinations.description: Explore the pearl of the Indian Ocean - from ancient kingdoms and sacred temples to misty mountains, wildlife reserves, and pristine beaches.

sigiriya.title: Sigiriya & Dambulla
sigiriya.description: Iconic Lion Rock fortress with ancient frescoes, 1st century BC cave temples with 150+ Buddha statues.

kandy.title: Kandy - Cultural Capital
kandy.description: Sacred Temple of the Tooth, Royal Botanical Gardens, colonial architecture, traditional Kandyan dance.

nuwaraEliya.title: Nuwara Eliya - Little England
nuwaraEliya.description: Cool climate hill station, tea plantations and factories, Horton Plains World's End, Victorian architecture.

ancientCities.title: Ancient Cities
ancientCities.description: Anuradhapura and Polonnaruwa UNESCO sites, 2,250-year-old sacred Bo tree, ancient stupas and palaces.

ella.title: Ella & Hill Country
ella.description: Scenic train journeys through tea estates, Little Adam's Peak trek, Nine Arch Bridge, mountain views.

wildlife.title: Wildlife & National Parks
wildlife.description: Yala leopard safari, Wilpattu elephants, Udawalawe wildlife, Sinharaja rainforest, whale watching.

ramayana.title: Ramayana Trail
ramayana.description: Sacred Hindu temples: Munneswaram, Koneshwaram, Seetha Amman, Bhakta Hanuman with spiritual significance.

southern.title: Southern Coast
southern.description: Historic Galle Fort, Unawatuna and Mirissa beaches, turtle hatcheries, Madu River mangroves, water sports.

trincomalee.title: Trincomalee & East Coast
trincomalee.description: Ancient Koneshwaram Temple, pristine beaches, Pigeon Island, snorkeling, diving, less-crowded coastal paradise.

packages.title: Curated Tour Packages
packages.description: Expertly crafted journeys that showcase Sri Lanka's finest destinations, cultural heritage, and natural wonders.

services.title: White-Glove Services
services.description: From inspiration to return, we handle every detail.

tailored.title: Tailor-Made Itineraries
tailored.description: Designed around your pace and passions.

stays.title: Handpicked Stays
stays.description: Luxury hotels, villas, and private retreats.

concierge.title: Concierge Support
concierge.description: VIP transfers, experiences, and on-trip care.

about.title: Your Journey, Perfected
about.description1: Having started operation in the hospitality industry with the opening of Lavish Eco Jungle in 2018, and setting a high standard earning a certificate of excellence from Booking.com, we decided to expand our service to include inbound tours.
about.description2: Lavish Travel and Tours aims to provide the same high standard of service to make your visit to Sri Lanka a truly memorable one.

contact.title: Ready for your Sri Lanka escape?
contact.description: Tell us your Sri Lanka dream — we'll handle the rest.

testimonials.title: What Our Travelers Say
testimonials.description: Real stories from guests who experienced the magic of Sri Lanka with us.

items.name: Sarah & James Mitchell
items.text: Lavish Travels made our honeymoon absolutely unforgettable. Every detail was perfectly arranged — from the private villa in Ella to the sunrise at Sigiriya. We felt like royalty the entire trip.

items.name: Rajesh Sharma
items.text: The Ramayana Trail tour was a deeply spiritual experience. Our guide was incredibly knowledgeable about each temple's history and significance. This trip touched our hearts.

items.name: Anna Petrova
items.text: From the moment we landed, everything was seamless. The wildlife safari in Yala, the train ride through tea country, the beaches in the south — Sri Lanka exceeded all our expectations.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Always here when you need us

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before your Sri Lanka adventure.

items.question: What is the best time to visit Sri Lanka?
items.answer: Sri Lanka is a year-round destination. The west and south coasts are best from November to April, while the east coast is ideal from May to September. The cultural triangle and hill country can be visited year-round with slightly cooler temperatures from December to February.

items.question: How do I get a personalized quote for a tour?
items.answer: Simply click 'Plan Your Trip' or 'Inquire Now' on any tour package, fill in your details and preferences, and our travel experts will get back to you within 24 hours with a customized itinerary and pricing based on your group size, dates, and preferences.

items.question: Do I need a visa to visit Sri Lanka?
items.answer: Most nationalities require an Electronic Travel Authorization (ETA) which can be obtained online. We can assist you with the visa process as part of our concierge services. The ETA is typically valid for 30 days and can be extended.

items.question: Are your tours suitable for families with children?
items.answer: Absolutely! We tailor every itinerary to your needs. For families, we adjust the pace, include child-friendly activities like wildlife safaris and beach time, and select family-friendly accommodations. Just let us know the ages of your children when inquiring.

items.question: What is included in your tour packages?
items.answer: Our packages typically include accommodation, private transport with an English-speaking driver-guide, breakfast daily, selected entrance fees, and airport transfers. Specific inclusions vary by package — click 'View Details' on any tour to see the full list.

items.question: Can I customize any tour package?
items.answer: Yes! Every tour can be fully customized. You can add extra days, change hotels, add activities, or combine elements from different packages. Contact us with your preferences and we'll create a bespoke itinerary just for you.

exitIntent.title: Wait! Don't miss out
exitIntent.description: Let us craft your perfect Sri Lanka journey. Get a free, personalized quote from our travel experts.
